POST CONCRETE

PROFESSIONAL FOUNDATION SYSTEMS

I highly recommend their professional work!

5 stars for CourTex with communication, timeliness, and delivery on my beautiful new multi-use court! They needed to level out the property and bring in 4 feet of dirt. CourTex turned a giant sandbox into a beautiful pickleball court I now coach on!

CourTex was neat and cleaned up exceptionally well too. I highly recommend their professional work!

— Kate DeBolt, Austin Texas

PROFESSIONAL PICKLEBALL COURT BUILDERS

15+ Years of Pickleball Court Construction

RESURFACING

At CourTex Construction we restore tennis, pickleball, and multi-use courts with expert resurfacing services. 15+ years of experience in both technical and artistic aspects.

GETTING
STARTED

1

REQUEST A QUOTE

Fill out a quick form with your details, and our team will arrange a property survey to explore the best location options for your court.

2

DESIGN & BUILD

Work with our experts to customize your court's layout, materials, and features to fit your vision and budget. Then, we bring it to life with professional installation.

3

ENJOY YOUR COURT

It's time to play! Gather family and friends, stay active, and make lasting memories on your brand-new championship-quality court.

COURTEX LOCATIONS

COURTEX CONSTRUCTION PROUDLY DESIGNS AND BUILDS PICKLEBALL, TENNIS, BASKETBALL, AND MULTI-USE COURTS ACROSS TEXAS, COLORADO, AND THE CAROLINAS.

TEXAS

  • AUSTIN
  • DFW
  • HOUSTON
  • SAN ANTONIO

COLORADO & WYOMING

  • FORT COLLINS
  • DENVER
  • CHEYENNE
  • COLORADO SPRINGS

CAROLINAS

  • COLUMBIA
  • CHARLOTTE
  • RALEIGH
